drawings.name: Ultra-Minimal
drawings.description: Flat matte black surfaces, no branding, small monolith aesthetic, simple rectangular form, subtle recessed d-pad and buttons

drawings.name: Warm Retro
drawings.description: Inspired by original Game Boy, soft rounded edges, cream and beige tones, nostalgic design, chunky buttons

drawings.name: Industrial
drawings.description: Exposed Phillips head fasteners, matte brushed aluminum texture, utilitarian aesthetic, visible screws, tactical feel

drawings.name: Futuristic Organic
drawings.description: Soft flowing curves, translucent frosted shell, subtle pastel color gradient, smooth biomorphic form
